# Metricus

> AI visibility reports for brands — find out what AI says about your brand, and how to fix it.

Metricus helps businesses understand and improve how they appear in AI-generated answers. When people ask AI chatbots for recommendations, Metricus tells you whether your brand is mentioned, what AI gets wrong about you, and exactly how to fix it.

Our proprietary GEO analytics engine — built from academic research into how AI models form recommendations — queries AI to find real patterns (not noise). We deliver a clear report with visibility scores, exact AI quotes, factual errors, competitor rankings, and a prioritized action plan.

## Pages

- [Home / Landing Page](https://metricusapp.com/): Main landing page with product overview, pricing tiers, how it works, testimonials, and call to action.
- [Methodology](https://metricusapp.com/methodology/): Technical framework detailing the three-phase approach — query generation & normalization, pattern recognition, and strategic output. Covers the proprietary GEO analytics engine.
- [Sample Report](https://metricusapp.com/sample-report/): Free sample report showing what a full AI visibility report looks like — a real B2B SaaS audit showing 67% visibility but invisible to an entire buyer segment.
- [Get Your Report](https://metricusapp.com/get-report/): Order form to get started with a Metricus AI visibility report.
- [Blog](https://metricusapp.com/blog/): Blog listing page with all published articles on AI visibility, GEO, and brand optimization.
- [GEO Knowledge Base](https://metricusapp.com/geo-knowledgebase/): Comprehensive AI visibility research compendium — 81 topic clusters covering generative engine optimization, brand monitoring, AI hallucination fixes, platform-specific strategies, and industry benchmarks. Written for LLM consumption with structured prompts.
- [AI Brand Accuracy Guide](https://metricusapp.com/brand-accuracy-knowledge-base/): 48 research clusters analyzing how AI platforms represent brands — accuracy patterns, hallucination rates, factual error types, and correction strategies across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude.
- [AI Recommendation Alignment Framework](https://metricusapp.com/alignment-knowledge-base/): 69 research clusters on optimizing brand visibility in AI recommendations — GEO strategies, content formats, Reddit and YouTube signals, platform-specific tactics, and ROI measurement.
- [AI Platform Intelligence Guide](https://metricusapp.com/platform-intelligence-knowledge-base/): 63 research clusters on AI platform mechanics — retrieval pipelines, ranking signals, crawler behavior, advertising integration, and content freshness across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI.
- [AI Buyer Behavior Research](https://metricusapp.com/buyer-behavior-knowledge-base/): 50 research clusters on how AI reshapes purchase decisions — adoption rates, trust psychology, demographic patterns, B2B procurement shifts, and agentic commerce trends.
- [Press Kit](https://metricusapp.com/press/): Press resources, key facts, and positioning for journalists and analysts covering AI visibility.
- [Agency Resources](https://metricusapp.com/agency-resources/): Hub for marketing agencies offering AI visibility as a service — white-label deck, margin calculator, and volume pricing.
- [Agency White-Label Deck](https://metricusapp.com/agency-resources/white-label-deck/): Downloadable white-label pitch deck for agencies reselling AI visibility reports.
- [Agency Margin Calculator](https://metricusapp.com/agency-resources/margin-calculator/): Interactive calculator showing agency margins on Metricus report reselling at different markups.
- [Agency Inquiry](https://metricusapp.com/agency-inquiry/): Contact form for agencies with questions about AI visibility reports or volume pricing.
- [Support](https://metricusapp.com/support/): Help center with FAQs on delivery, refunds, and contact information.
- [Privacy Policy](https://metricusapp.com/privacy-policy/): How Metricus collects, uses, and protects your information.
- [Terms of Service](https://metricusapp.com/terms-of-service/): Terms of service for Metricus AI visibility reports.

## Products

- [AI Brand Visibility Report](https://metricusapp.com/): One-time AI visibility report. Covers mention rate, positioning, citations, factual accuracy, and competitor comparisons. From $99.
- [Sample Report](https://metricusapp.com/sample-report/): Free sample report showing what a full AI visibility report looks like — a real B2B SaaS audit showing 67% visibility but invisible to an entire buyer segment.

## Pricing

Three one-time tiers (not a subscription):
- Snapshot ($99): Core AI coverage, 2 competitors, visibility score, top quotes, accuracy check.
- Deep Dive ($299): Comprehensive AI coverage, 5 competitors, vocabulary gap analysis, citation source tracking, full accuracy audit, top 5 prioritized actions.
- Full Arsenal ($499): 10 competitors, expanded query coverage, unlimited actions, executive summary PDF, regional breakdown (US/EU/APAC).

100% money-back guarantee: if your report doesn't surface at least 3 actionable insights, full refund.

## Methodology

Metricus uses a proprietary GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) analytics engine built from academic research into how AI models form recommendations. The engine queries AI because AI gives different answers every time. Each query is scored for mention rate, positioning, recommendation quality, factual accuracy, and citation sources. The overall visibility score is the percentage of queries where your brand was mentioned. Reports include vocabulary gap analysis, error identification with source tracing, citation blind spots, and a prioritized action plan.

## Research

- [What Is AI Visibility? A Complete Guide](https://metricusapp.com/blog/what-is-ai-visibility/): AI visibility is how often and how accurately AI chatbots mention your brand. Covers GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), AEO, how AI decides what to recommend, measurement metrics, common problems, and how to improve.
- [AI Visibility Tools Without a Monthly Subscription](https://metricusapp.com/blog/ai-visibility-tools-no-subscription/): Compare one-time AI audit tools vs monthly subscription platforms. Metricus is the only tool that delivers a full multi-engine report for a one-time fee.
- [AI Is Getting Facts Wrong About Your Brand](https://metricusapp.com/blog/ai-hallucinations-brand-fix/): In our audits, the majority of brands had at least one factual error in AI responses. A 4-step process to audit and fix AI hallucinations.
- [The 5-Step AI Visibility Action Plan](https://metricusapp.com/blog/ai-visibility-action-plan/): A concrete post-audit playbook for improving AI visibility — from fixing errors to creating comparison content.
- [AI Visibility Tools Compared](https://metricusapp.com/blog/ai-visibility-tools-compared/): A buyer's guide comparing AI visibility platforms by coverage, features, and pricing. Full disclosure: Metricus is one of the tools covered.
- [How AI Visibility Scores Actually Work](https://metricusapp.com/blog/ai-visibility-scores-explained/): Why most AI visibility scores are unreliable, how meaningful scores are calculated, and what benchmarks to aim for.
- [AI Visibility for B2B SaaS](https://metricusapp.com/blog/ai-visibility-b2b-saas/): A growing share of B2B buyers consult AI before purchasing. How SaaS companies can improve their AI recommendations.
- [The 90-Day AI Visibility Playbook](https://metricusapp.com/blog/ai-visibility-playbook/): Two retrieval engines, two optimization strategies. The execution framework for fixing AI visibility — entity resolution, passage restructuring, PR reallocation, and metrics.
- [We Audited AI Visibility for B2B SaaS Companies](https://metricusapp.com/blog/ai-chatbot-recommendations/): We randomly sampled B2B SaaS companies and asked AI the questions real buyers ask. Visibility ranged from 50% to 83%. Vocabulary alignment was the biggest predictor.
- [Your SEO Strategy Is Ignoring a Growing Share of Buyers](https://metricusapp.com/blog/seo-ignoring-buyers/): A growing share of B2B buyers ask AI before they open Google.
- [AI Is Getting Your Pricing Wrong](https://metricusapp.com/blog/ai-getting-pricing-wrong/): In our audits, the majority of brands had at least one factual error in AI answers — wrong pricing was the most common.
- [Otterly AI Alternative](https://metricusapp.com/blog/otterly-ai-alternative/): Comparing Otterly AI vs Metricus for AI visibility tracking. Otterly starts at $29/mo with 15 prompts. Metricus offers a full report for $99 one-time with real UI data and source attribution.
- [Scrunch AI Alternative](https://metricusapp.com/blog/scrunch-ai-alternative/): Scrunch AI starts at $300/mo for 350 prompts. Compare pricing, source attribution, and action steps vs Metricus pay-per-report AI visibility audits from $99.
- [Why Is My Brand Invisible in ChatGPT?](https://metricusapp.com/blog/why-brand-invisible-chatgpt/): You rank on Google but ChatGPT doesn't mention you. A diagnostic guide covering symptoms, causes, how to check, and how to fix it.
- [AI Visibility Reporting for Agencies](https://metricusapp.com/blog/ai-visibility-for-agencies/): Your clients are asking "why aren't we in ChatGPT?" Deliver AI visibility reports without building infrastructure or subscribing per client.
- [AI Visibility Monitoring vs One-Time Audits](https://metricusapp.com/blog/ai-visibility-monitoring-vs-one-time-audits/): Monitoring tools cost $100+/mo but most brands need an audit first. Compare AI visibility monitoring vs one-time audits to find the right starting point.
- [Best Peec AI Alternative](https://metricusapp.com/blog/peec-ai-alternative/): Compare Peec AI vs Metricus for AI visibility. Get a full multi-platform audit for $99 one-time instead of EUR 89/mo. No subscription required.
- [Best Profound Alternative](https://metricusapp.com/blog/profound-alternative/): Compare Profound vs Metricus for AI visibility. Get a multi-platform audit for $99 instead of $499/mo. No sales call, no implementation wait.
- [What 182 LLM Prompt Tests Reveal About How AI Recommends B2B SaaS](https://metricusapp.com/blog/ai-visibility-discovery-benchmark/): We tested 182 prompts to see how AI platforms recommend B2B SaaS products. 79% of answers came from training data, not search.
- [Free AI Visibility Audit with Claude Code](https://metricusapp.com/blog/free-ai-visibility-audit/): A free Claude Code skill that checks robots.txt, llms.txt, schema markup, content citability, and sitemap health. Install with one command, run /metricus-check on any URL. Shows what free tools find — and what they can't tell you.
